questionHtml: Suggest how the graph would differ for a human during a long period of inactivity.
markschemeHtml:
1. more resorption than formation;
  2. PICP/bone formation (always) lower (than in bears);
  3. ICTP/bone resorption (always) higher (than in bears);
  4. ICTP above PICP by a greater amount in humans (than in bears);

meta.title: Suggest how the graph would differ for a human during a long period of inactivity.
